When Moon is locked between Mars and Dragon Head,
there will be mental aberration, over flowing emotions,
hallucinations etc. An astrologer can trace out these causes and
offer a solution for it. In other words an exorcizing method may
be suggested.
In some parts of the world, there is .a method where
turmeric powder is mixed with water.and the Margosa twigs and
dipped in the turmeric mixed water. The turmeric water is
sprinkled over the Head of the affected native and the turmeric
water dipped margosa twigs are lashed around the head of the
native. This lashing gives rise to the sound "PHAT, PHAT,
(PATHA SWAHA)" and this sound "PHAT" has tremendous
psychological and scientific effect (power) to drive out the
hallucinations and disturbances of the mental faculties. The native
will be relieved of the problem. There are different procedures

12 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
prevalent in different nations followed by different people with
regard to exorcism.
